title: peristylus macrophyllus
intro: Peristylus macrophyllus, also known as the large-leaved peristylus, is an orchid species native to Asia. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Peristylus macrophyllus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in Ayurvedic and Chinese medicine.
